title: Filipino-Style Lumpia with Deodeok and Root Vegetable
description: A crispy Filipino-inspired snack filled with sweet and savory deodeok and root vegetables. Serve with a side of tangy xtra sauce for a delightful treat.

ingredients.name: Root Vegetable (such as Carrot or Beet)
Xtra (a Filipino condiment similar to vinegar)

instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
In a large bowl, combine the grated deodeok and root vegetable.
Add the salt and mix well.
Lay a lumpia wrapper on a flat surface and place about 1 tablespoon of the deodeok mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Brush the edges of the wrapper with water and fold the wrapper into a triangle, pressing the edges to seal.
Heat the oil in the deep frying pan and fry the lumpia until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Drain the lumpia on paper towels and serve hot with xtra sauce for dipping.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
